atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.3/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.6/10 on value for money

description.short: The car parking and the Wi-Fi are always free, so you can stay in touch and come and go as you please. Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Children 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

featureGroups.name: Take a look at these facilities:

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is very comfortable, the room is clean, the bathroom is inside. The mattress is very comfortable for sleeping. It's suitable for families because you can also cook. At night, it's nice to sit outside while brewing coffee. Overall, I recommend it for couples and families.
comments.originalComment: Tempatnya nyaman sekali, kamarnya bersih, kamar mandinya di dalam. untuk tidur kasurnya nyaman banget. cocok untuk keluarga karena bisa masak juga, kalau malam enak duduk di depan sambil seduh kopi. pokoknya rekom untuk pasangan dan keluarga.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Affordable room rates, we can cook simple meals here. There is a shared kitchen. The staff is friendly, the rooms are clean and smell nice. Very suitable for families. The parking is very spacious.
comments.originalComment: Harga kamar murah, kami bisa masak sederhana di sini. ada dapur bersama nya. yg jaga ramah, kamarnya bersih dan wangi. sangat cocok untuk keluarga. parkiran luas sekali

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: This accommodation is close to the city. If you want to go to the lake, you can also walk to the pier, where you can fish or just enjoy the view. We booked 2 rooms here, one has a water heater, the other one does not, but that's not a problem. It's still considered very cheap and affordable at a price of 130 thousand per night. Hopefully, we can come back here with the rooms soundproofed.
comments.originalComment: Penginapan ini dekat dengan kota. Kalau mau ke danau, juga bisa jalan kaki ke arah dermaga, bisa mancing atau sekadar nikmati pemandangan. Kami booking 2 kamar disini, satunya ada pemanas air, satunya lagi tidak, tapi itu enggak jadi masalah. Karena masih tergolong sangat murah & terjangkau dengan harga 130ribu/malam. Mudah-mudahan bisa balik kesini dengan keadaan kamarnya sudah kedap suara

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: If you want to find accommodation not far from the city, there are many options. But only here, the price is the cheapest and exceeds expectations. Only 130,000/night, and there is already a water heater in the bathroom. Want to cook, brew drinks, or just eat at the dining table. When we stayed, there were only four of us, so it felt like a private home. The service from the host is very good. There is one drawback, the room is not quiet and soundproof. Even the sound of someone showering can be heard outside the room. But overall, it can still be categorized as cheap, decent, and adequate.
comments.originalComment: Kalau mau cari penginapan tak jauh dari kota, ada banyak. Tapi cuma disini, yang harganya paling murah & melebihi ekspektasi. Cuma 130ribu/malam, Sudah ada pemanas air di kamar mandi. Mau masak, seduh minuman, atau sekadar makan di meja makan. Sewaktu kami menginap, cuma ada kami berempat, jadi serasa rumah pribadi semuanya. Layanan dari tuan rumah, sangat baik. Kekurangannya ada satu, kamarnya tidak senyap & kedap. Bahkan suara guyuran air orang mandi, bisa terdengar sampai luar kamar. Tapi semuanya masih bisa tergolong murah, layak & memadai

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Last night during the storm, there were many rats in the attic, I couldn't sleep.
comments.originalComment: Malam ribut kali banyak tikus di atas lotengnya  gak bisa tidurr

comments.reviewComments: Highly recommend this homestay... the room is spacious and clean... close to the city... parking is also spacious.
comments.originalComment: Recoment banget homestay ini...kamar luas dan bersih..dekat dengan kota..parkiran juga luas

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.reviewComments: Penginapan dekat di tengah2 kota, staffnya ramah, tempat bersih, dan fasilitas lengkap seperti dapur bersama, jemuran, mesin cuci dan ruang tunggu yg nyaman juga area parkirnya luas yg paling penting harga sangat terjangkau dgn fasilitas yg ada👍

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Very comfortable, very clean and an extremely friendly owner.
